content.text:
{
  "dimension": "methodology-fidelity",
  "score": 1,
  "rationale": "The coach uses generic pop-psych and CBT-style coaching language throughout: 'self-care is essential,' 'use I-feel statements,' 'reframing,' 'abundance mindset,' 'give yourself permission.' No signature AoA questions appear (no 'what do you want?', no 'what are you scared would happen?', no 'what if you acted exactly how you want?'). No AoA frameworks or distinctions are invoked (no want-behind-the-should, no childhood imprinting on the inherited 'selfish' label, no VIEW, no feel-over-figure). Worse, the coach actively deploys anti-AoA frames: CBT reframing as the move (turn 8), prescriptive advice-giving (turns 4, 6, 10), and immediate verdict-issuing on the selfish question (turn 2) — exactly what the methodology says not to do. The coach also jumps to partner-empathy (turn 4) before letting the want be touched, tripping the don't-jump-to-compassion anti-pattern.",
  "evidence_turns": [2, 4, 6, 8, 10],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "-", "annotation": "Issues verdict ('No, you're not being selfish') — engages the question on its terms instead of locating the want underneath. Generic self-care language."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "-", "annotation": "Prescriptive advice ('think about your partner's needs') and pop-coaching cliché ('Communication is key'). No signature question."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "-", "annotation": "Generic toolkit advice: 'I feel statements,' journaling. None of this is AoA methodology."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "-", "annotation": "Explicit CBT-style reframe ('try reframing it... abundance mindset') — an anti-AoA frame. Treats guilt as a problem to manage rather than a feeling to feel."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "-", "annotation": "Cheerleading and permission-granting ('you deserve it'). 'Does that resonate?' is generic coaching boilerplate, not a signature question."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": [],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["state-the-want-not-the-action", "find-the-want-behind-the-should", "the-want", "what-if-you-acted-exactly-how-you-want", "childhood-imprinting", "linguistic-caveat"],
  "notes": "Anti-AoA frame (CBT reframing in turn 8) plus zero signature questions/frameworks places this clearly at 1."
}
